channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First✝️ Custom Treehouse Builder southadvs@gmail.com YT channel below 👇

item.title: Its was a 50 foot drop. I’ve climbed this ladder hundreds of t...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Its was a 50 foot drop. I’ve climbed this ladder hundreds of times, and the last time I ever do it this happens..One “last” tour was almost literal. Thankfully instinct kicked in…So grateful to God for protecting my brother and I, and the 3 dachshunds that were down below. Part two will reveal what happened, my injuries, and the aftermath. Follow & Stay tuned.
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fyp #foryoupage

item.title: Whos Petunia? Where does she come up with these things? Unfortun...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Whos Petunia? Where does she come up with these things? Unfortunately the mics stopped picking up audio halfway through this video, but now you can really see how much of a difference good audio quality makes in a video. To me it’s painful to watch with the all the background noise and crappy audio. Sorry about that guys and gals, we’ll be fixed up in the next video.
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction #fyp

item.title: Did I mess it up? Not sure how I feel about these. The look is c...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Did I mess it up? Not sure how I feel about these. The look is cool but the color may be off. What do you guys think?
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction #fyp

item.title: She had one job haha -Also scratch what I said about the dishwas...
item.description:
View on TikTok


She had one job haha -Also scratch what I said about the dishwasher, guess we don’t have a choice. Its goin in according to
@marysadventure_ #treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction #fyp #electrical

item.title: It's gonna be a learning curve, and not something I can afford t...
item.description:
View on TikTok


It's gonna be a learning curve, and not something I can afford to screw up! Gotta get this right.
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction #fyp

item.title: The moment you’ve all been waiting for…. # # # #
item.description:

The moment you’ve all been waiting for…. # # # #
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction

item.title: That was about as difficult as I expected it to be. Saw some gre...
item.description:
View on TikTok


That was about as difficult as I expected it to be. Saw some great ideas in the comments on what we should use this back porch for. Im thinking to use it as an access to climb another 15 feet up the tree to a crows nest over 50 feet above the ground! # # # # #
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fyp #construction

item.title: Should we run the railings all the way? This is easily the most ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Should we run the railings all the way? This is easily the most dangerous part of the treehouse. On the front porch it’s just a 9 foot drop to the lower deck, and the lower deck is a 24 foot drop, but the back porch is 33 feet straight down. Its a cool spot tho.
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fyp #blika

item.title: What should we use the back porch for? Also, anyone else hear ho...
item.description:
View on TikTok


What should we use the back porch for? Also, anyone else hear how LONG it took for that to hit the ground??
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #tinyhouse #construction #fyp #diy

item.title: Now is your chance to give me any and all ideas for what needs t...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Now is your chance to give me any and all ideas for what needs to be added to the treehouse, electricity wise. Drop em! Also, don’t worry, we’re still gonna have a manual switch to flip this entire thing to off-grid power. Thats a non negotiable.
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #tinyhouse #construction #cabin
